item.title: 3 Big Dividend Stocks Just Raised Payouts—Here’s Who’s Leading in 2026
item.description: Dividends are moving up for three mid-to-high yield stocks that are big-time players in their respective industries. Their yields sit between 2.5% and...

item.title: The Supply Chain Quietly Powering the AI Boom—And 4 Ways to Play It
item.description: Get a clear map of the nanotech stack behind AI chips—lithography, fabrication tools, and ultra-pure materials—and why these suppliers matter for long...

item.title: Why Are Amphenol, Royal Caribbean, and Freeport Insiders Selling?
item.description: After long fruitful rallies and explosive spikes, insiders are selling APH, RCL and FCX. See which of these sales raise alarm bells among investors.

item.title: Hinge Health’s AI Moat Might Be Its Patient Movement Data
item.description: Hinge Health is growing impressively within healthcare's physical therapy niche, and there are significant reasons for bullishness going forward.

item.title: These 5 Stocks Are at the Center of the AI Supply Squeeze
item.description: AI adoption is accelerating globally, but infrastructure buildout is lagging, creating bottlenecks across memory, chips, data centers, and power.
